# Bjorn Lennox

First mentioned: **3305-04-25**  
Last mentioned: **3305-05-31**  
Total mentions: **3**

## Related


## Biography

In April 3305, Commander Bjorn Lennox reported his Diamondback Explorer stolen from a sealed hangar bay at Fort Dixon in the Vega system — a theft that appeared impossible given the station's security protocols. The case baffled investigators until starship technician Gan Romero was identified as the culprit, though the explanation only deepened the mystery.

When the official investigation was suspended without resolution, Lennox offered a haunting speculation: Romero may have been called to "a place that most people can't understand." The remark referenced encrypted dream journals recovered from Romero's quarters, in which he described radiant alien spaces and disembodied voices. Lennox's willingness to entertain explanations beyond conventional criminal psychology transformed him from a victim of theft into an inadvertent witness to one of the earliest documented cases of potential telepathic alien contact.
